subcodes.first_line: O Compassionate God! Thou hast created all humanity from a single lineage, that they might become as members of one family and as Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یزدان مهربان جمیع بشر را از یک سلاله خلق فرمودی تا اعضای یکخاندان گردند و بندگان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prayer for peace and unity, @the Lesser Peace and the Most Great Peace, @love of God
